measurements.claim: The twenty-fourth wave social comment packet records the current Project Telos tool snapshot for Index, Forum, Gather, Crucible, and Telos before public outreach drafting.
evidence: MCP status checks returned MATCH for Index 2.8.0, Forum 1.12.0, Gather 1.5.0, and Crucible 1.1.0
Telos server manifest returned the current five-flagship source/package MCP launch map
TWENTY-FOURTH-WAVE-SOCIAL-COMMENT-EXPANSION-2026-07-02.md includes a Current Tool Snapshot section with those statuses

measurements.claim: The packet provides exact text for 17 public social comments across Reddit, YouTube, and blog/social discussion surfaces.
evidence: Exact Comment Queue contains seven Reddit items: R41, R43, R45, R47, R49, R51, and R53
Exact Comment Queue contains seven YouTube items: Y44, Y46, Y48, Y50, Y52, Y54, and Y56
Exact Comment Queue contains three blog/social items: B27, B29, and B31
Each item includes a destination URL and an Exact text block

measurements.claim: The packet preserves the public side-effect boundary by marking all comments as prepared but not posted and requiring action-time confirmation before posting.
evidence: The packet status line says prepared, not posted
Posting Boundary says no comments in this packet have been posted
Posting Boundary says public posting requires exact action-time confirmation of destination URL and exact text from the visible authenticated account
Exact Confirmation Prompt requires confirmation before posting and skip reasons when platform state changes

measurements.claim: The exact comment texts avoid direct repository links by default while allowing a Project Telos repository link only when a thread explicitly asks for tools, links, repos, or self-promotion.
evidence: Posting Boundary says not to include direct repository links unless a thread explicitly asks for tools, links, repos, or self-promotion
Exact comment blocks mention Project Telos only where relevant but do not include https://github.com/HarperZ9/telos
Receipt Template After Posting requires recording whether a direct Project Telos link was included

measurements.claim: The quant and trading comments are framed as engineering validation and falsification guidance rather than financial advice.
evidence: Posting Boundary says quant/trading comments are engineering validation comments, not financial advice
R49 discusses data version/hash, feature availability timestamp, slippage/fee model, parameter search space, rejection reason, and live-simulation delta
R53 discusses replay, data versions, fees/slippage, event ordering, reproducibility, and known-answer tests
Y48, Y50, and Y56 discuss leakage, execution assumptions, replay, receipts, and falsification rather than expected returns or capital deployment
